text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion continues her preparations to return
to Ireland next year. She's acting the same as
ever, but there's a hint of tension in her
expression.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Realizing that something is off with Fine Motion,
an irritated Air Shakur confronts her angrily.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's clear that Fine Motion has been using logic to
suppress her desire to keep running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But even after this exchange, she is intent on
prioritizing her duties, declaring that she will find
a way to deal with her individual feelings on her
own.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing Fine Motion's determination, I decide to
watch over her until she's made sense of her
emotions.
